steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to "emphasize a difference between the two muslins." The correct choice must place both Dhaka muslin and sheeting muslin side by side and explicitly contrast them on at least one characteristic.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — Dhaka muslin is a handmade fabric with an extremely fine weave, while sheeting muslin is machine made with a coarse weave.: directly contrasts both muslins on how they are made and their weave — fulfills the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — Dhaka muslin and sheeting muslin are two different types of woven cotton fabrics.: asserts that the two are different but does not show how — does not emphasize any specific difference. ✗
  • Choice C — Muslins can be used in a variety of ways, from making luxury clothing to upholstering furniture and creating backdrops for theater sets.: describes uses of muslin generally without distinguishing between the two types. ✗
  • Choice D — Sheeting muslin is machine made, has a coarse weave, and is used for furniture and theater sets.: describes only sheeting muslin; Dhaka muslin is not mentioned. ✗
That is the correct answer.
